scenario_desc: Login with valid credentials - Positive Testing

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid registered email address
3. Enter correct password
4. Click Login button
5. Verify redirect to dashboard
test_cases.expected: User successfully logs in and is redirected to personalized dashboard

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter correct password
4. Check "Remember Me" checkbox
5. Click Login
6. Close browser
7. Reopen browser and access application
test_cases.expected: User remains logged in and session persists across browser sessions
test_cases.test_data: Email: user@example.com, Password: Test@123, Remember Me: Checked

scenario_desc: Login with invalid credentials - Negative Testing

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter incorrect password
4. Click Login button
5. Verify error message displayed
test_cases.expected: Login fails with error message "Invalid email or password"

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter unregistered email
3. Enter any password
4. Click Login button
5. Verify error message
test_cases.expected: Login fails with error message "Account not found"

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Leave email field empty
3. Enter password
4. Click Login button
5. Verify validation error
test_cases.expected: Validation error displayed: "Email is required"

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter email
3. Leave password field empty
4. Click Login button
5. Verify validation error
test_cases.expected: Validation error displayed: "Password is required"

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Leave both email and password empty
3. Click Login button
4. Verify validation errors for both fields
test_cases.expected: Validation errors displayed for both email and password fields

scenario_desc: Login with boundary and edge case inputs

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter email with maximum allowed length (254 characters)
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login
5. Verify system handles correctly
test_cases.expected: System accepts maximum length email and processes login correctly

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter email with special characters
3. Enter password
4. Click Login
5. Verify system handles special characters
test_cases.expected: System correctly processes email with special characters

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter email with leading/trailing spaces
3. Enter password
4. Click Login
5. Verify system trims spaces
test_cases.expected: System trims spaces and processes login correctly

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter password with minimum length (8 characters)
3. Verify acceptance
4. Enter password with maximum length (128 characters)
5. Verify acceptance
test_cases.expected: System accepts passwords within defined length boundaries

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter SQL injection code in email field
3. Enter password
4. Click Login
5. Verify system prevents SQL injection
test_cases.expected: System sanitizes input and prevents SQL injection attack, login fails safely

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter XSS script in email field
3. Click Login
4. Verify script is not executed
5. Check output is escaped
test_cases.expected: System prevents XSS attack by escaping special characters

test_cases.steps:
1. Enter wrong password 5 times consecutively
2. Verify account lockout after 5 attempts
3. Try to login with correct password
4. Verify account is locked
5. Check lockout duration
test_cases.expected: Account is locked after 5 failed attempts, displays lockout message with duration

test_cases.steps:
1. Login successfully
2. Copy session token/cookie
3. Logout
4. Try to use old session token to access protected page
5. Verify access denied
test_cases.expected: Old session tokens are invalidated after logout, access is denied

test_cases.steps:
1. Login successfully
2. Remain idle for 30 minutes
3. Try to perform any action
4. Verify session timeout
5. Check redirect to login page
test_cases.expected: Session expires after 30 minutes of inactivity, user is redirected to login

test_cases.steps:
1. Open login page
2. Check if page uses HTTPS protocol
3. Verify SSL certificate is valid
4. Check password field is masked
5. Verify no sensitive data in URL
test_cases.expected: Login page uses HTTPS, SSL certificate valid, password masked, no data in URL

scenario_desc: Login UI/UX and responsive design testing

test_cases.steps:
1. Open login page on desktop browser (1920x1080)
2. Verify all elements are visible
3. Check field alignment
4. Verify button placement
5. Test on different desktop resolutions
test_cases.expected: Login page displays correctly on desktop with proper layout and alignment

test_cases.steps:
1. Open login page on mobile device (iPhone)
2. Verify responsive layout
3. Check touch-friendly buttons
4. Test portrait and landscape modes
5. Verify keyboard doesn't hide fields
test_cases.expected: Login page is fully responsive on mobile devices with touch-friendly interface
test_cases.test_data: Mobile devices: iPhone 12, Samsung Galaxy S21

test_cases.steps:
1. Open login page on tablet (iPad)
2. Verify layout adapts to tablet size
3. Test portrait and landscape
4. Check touch interactions
5. Verify all elements accessible
test_cases.expected: Login page works correctly on tablets with appropriate layout
test_cases.test_data: Tablets: iPad Pro, Samsung Galaxy Tab

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Verify password field shows masked characters (dots/asterisks)
3. Click show/hide password icon
4. Verify password becomes visible
5. Click again to hide
test_cases.expected: Password masking works correctly with toggle functionality

test_cases.steps:
1. Open login page
2. Use Tab key to navigate between fields
3. Verify focus moves correctly (email → password → remember me → login button)
4. Press Enter on login button
5. Verify form submits
test_cases.expected: Keyboard navigation works correctly, Enter key submits form

test_cases.steps:
1. Open login page
2. Verify email field has auto-focus
3. Check placeholder text is visible
4. Verify field labels are clear
5. Check error messages are readable
test_cases.expected: UI elements are user-friendly with clear labels and helpful text

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to login page
2. Enter credentials
3. Click Login
4. Measure time from click to dashboard load
5. Verify response time is under 2 seconds
test_cases.expected: Login completes within 2 seconds under normal load

test_cases.steps:
1. Simulate 100 concurrent users logging in
2. Measure response times
3. Check for errors
4. Verify all logins complete successfully
5. Monitor server resources
test_cases.expected: System handles 100 concurrent logins without performance degradation

test_cases.steps:
1. Simulate 1000 concurrent users
2. Measure response times
3. Check error rates
4. Monitor CPU and memory usage
5. Verify system stability
test_cases.expected: System remains stable under load of 1000 concurrent users

test_cases.steps:
1. Measure login page load time
2. Check time to first byte (TTFB)
3. Measure DOM content loaded time
4. Verify page fully loads in under 3 seconds
5. Test on different network speeds
test_cases.expected: Login page loads completely within 3 seconds on standard network

test_cases.steps:
1. Login successfully
2. Verify session is created in database
3. Check user data is retrieved correctly
4. Verify dashboard loads with user-specific data
5. Check all integrated services are accessible
test_cases.expected: Login integrates correctly with database and all dependent services

test_cases.steps:
1. Simulate database connection failure
2. Attempt to login
3. Verify graceful error handling
4. Check appropriate error message displayed
5. Verify system doesn't crash
test_cases.expected: System handles database failures gracefully with user-friendly error message

test_cases.steps:
1. Login from one browser
2. Login from another browser with same credentials
3. Verify concurrent session handling
4. Check if previous session is invalidated or both allowed
5. Verify session management policy
test_cases.expected: System handles concurrent sessions according to defined policy

test_cases.steps:
1. Disconnect network
2. Attempt to login
3. Verify network error is caught
4. Check error message is displayed
5. Reconnect and retry
test_cases.expected: System displays clear network error message and allows retry after reconnection

test_cases.steps:
1. Enter valid credentials
2. Simulate server timeout during authentication
3. Verify timeout is handled
4. Check appropriate message displayed
5. Verify user can retry
test_cases.expected: System handles server timeout gracefully with retry option

test_cases.steps:
1. Enter credentials
2. Simulate 500 Internal Server Error
3. Verify error is caught
4. Check user-friendly error message
5. Verify system doesn't expose technical details
test_cases.expected: System displays generic error message without exposing technical details

test_cases.steps:
1. Login with locked account
2. Verify lockout message is displayed
3. Check lockout duration is shown
4. Verify contact support option available
5. Test account unlock after duration
test_cases.expected: Clear lockout message with duration and support contact information

test_cases.steps:
1. Navigate to form page
2. Enter invalid data in various fields (wrong format, special chars)
3. Click submit button
4. Verify validation messages appear
5. Check field highlighting
6. Verify form is not submitted
test_cases.expected: System validates all fields, displays clear error messages, and highlights invalid fields
test_cases.test_data: Invalid email: notanemail, Invalid phone: abc123

test_cases.steps:
1. Open form
2. Test field constraints (min/max length, numeric range)
3. Enter values exceeding limits
4. Verify real-time validation
5. Check error message clarity
test_cases.expected: Field constraints are enforced, validation occurs in real-time, and clear messages guide user
test_cases.test_data: Text exceeding max length, Number outside range

test_cases.steps:
1. Fill form with valid data after seeing errors
2. Verify error messages disappear
3. Submit form
4. Verify successful submission
test_cases.expected: Error messages clear when valid data is entered and form submits successfully
